title: OpenMercantil Company
description: A Spanish company report assembled from BORME and other integrated public-data sources by OpenMercantil. Informational only, not an official Registro Mercantil extract.

name.description: Registered company name as recorded in BORME.

cif.description: Codigo de Identificacion Fiscal (Spanish tax ID).

registered_address.description: Domicilio social as recorded in the registry.

province.description: Spanish province of the registered address.

registry.description: Name of the Registro Mercantil that holds the entry.

legal_form.description: Forma juridica (e.g., Sociedad Anonima, Sociedad Limitada).

last_event.description: Date of the most recent BORME act.

events_count.description: Total number of BORME acts associated with the company.
